ai_tips: Starting out at 141m — 5.23km ahead with 21m of climbing on the profile. 从海拔141米出发——全程5.23公里，累计爬升21米。
0.48km in — pace 6:15/km as the effort builds. 进行到0.48公里——配速6:15/公里，强度正在建立。
Mid-run at 2.71km — the route is largely flat to downhill (total climb just 0m), so rhythm matters more than strength. 进行到2.71公里过半程——路线以平路和下坡为主（总爬升仅0米），节奏比力量更关键。
High point of the route: 141m at 0.00km. From here the route mostly gives back. 全程最高点141米，位于0.00公里处。此后路线总体向下。
Steepest descent of the day: -12.7% at 0.10km — you let it flow at 5:05/km, good downhill confidence. 全天最陡的下坡：0.10公里处坡度-12.7%——你顺势加速到5:05/公里，下坡信心不错。
4.57km — late-run check: pace 9:03/km, effort showing as the pace slips. 4.57公里——后程检查：配速9:03/公里，疲劳显现，配速下滑。
Finished 5.23km in 33:55 (avg 6:29/km, +21m). Solid, steady effort end to end. 完成5.23公里，用时33:55（平均配速6:29/公里，爬升21米）。全程稳定扎实。
